item.title: Independent Search Engines
item.description: Here's a list providing a wide range of specialized search engines and tools that can be used to find information beyond what typical search engines like Google provide. These tools cover areas like satellite imagery, legal documents, chemical data, cybersecurity, etc. I haven't verified all of these myself, please comment if you find some of them don't work. And do expand and repost this list! https://www.wiby.me/ - Searches only handcrafted human websites from before SEO https://www.marginalia.nu/ - Finds only genuine sites buried under SEO spam https://www.same.energy/ - Searches images by pure visual mood and feeling https://www.tineye.com/ - Finds every website where any image ever appeared https://www.sentinel-hub.com/ - Searches real-time satellite imagery of any location https://www.zoom.earth/ - Searches live satellite and weather data globally free https://www.marinetraffic.com/ - Searches real-time location of every ship at sea https://www.flightaware.com/ - Searches live flight positions of every aircraft globally https://www.n2yo.com/ - Searches real-time position of every satellite orbiting earth https://www.space-reference.org/ - Searches complete data on every known space object https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene - Searches entire human genome and genetic sequence database https://www.uniprot.org/ - Searches every known protein structure on earth completely http://www.chemspider.com/ - Searches 100 million chemical structures and compounds free https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/ - Searches complete chemical data on any compound ever documented https://www.guidetopharmacology.org/ - Searches every known drug target and pharmacological interaction https://clinicaltrials.gov/ - Searches every medical trial happening globally right now https://www.courtlistener.com/ - Searches millions of US court opinions and legal documents https://pacer.uscourts.gov/ - Searches every US federal court case ever filed publicly https://www.judyrecords.com/ - Searches 330 million US court records completely free https://www.opensanctions.org/ - Searches every global sanctions list and criminal watchlist https://offshoreleaks.icij.org/ - Searches Panama and Pandora Papers for hidden wealth https://aleph.occrp.org/ - Searches leaked documents exposing global financial crimes https://globalfishingwatch.org/ - Searches real-time illegal fishing activity worldwide https://www.globalforestwatch.org/ - Searches real-time deforestation anywhere on earth https://earthdata.nasa.gov/ - Searches decades of NASA satellite environmental data free https://earthexplorer.usgs.gov/ - Searches historical satellite imagery of any location https://www.radioreference.com/ - Searches every radio frequency and scanner feed globally https://www.broadcastify.com/ - Searches live police fire and emergency radio feeds worldwide https://haveibeenpwned.com/ - Searches if your email appears in any breach database https://dehashed.com/ - Searches leaked credentials across hundreds of breach databases https://intelx.io/ - Searches dark web pastes leaks and historical breach archives https://www.shodan.io/ - Searches every internet-connected device exposed globally https://censys.io/ - Searches every publicly exposed server and certificate online https://www.greynoise.io/ - Searches malicious internet noise separated from real attacks https://netlas.io/ - Searches real-time internet assets for professional reconnaissance https://publicwww.com/ - Searches raw HTML source code across the entire web https://www.wolframalpha.com/ - Searches and computes answers from structured knowledge directly https://ahmia.fi/ - Searches verified Tor onion sites safely from the clearnet
item.dc:creator: NinjaCongo

item.title: In Egypt, MP El-Sayed Hassan Moussa tore up freshly laid asphalt from a road with his bare hands to denounce the poor quality of government work, going so far as to compare the fragility of the pavement to that of a pastry.
item.description: "it's called cold #asphalt. Yes, it's rubbish, normally it's only meant to be used temporarily in small spaces, but you'd never build a road with cold asphalt." > "By God, look at this! Is this even asphalt? It's like **Basbousa** (a soft semolina cake)!" He points out that the layer of asphalt is barely **3 centimeters** thick, far below standard road construction requirements. > "How many days has it been since this road was paved?" > **Worker:** "About a week, sir." > **Official:** "A week? And it’s already crumbling like this? Where is the bitumen? Where is the binding material? This isn't a road; it's a disaster!" > "Where is the President? Where is the Minister of Local Development? Where is the Governor? I’m not afraid of anyone. This is a waste of public funds! This work is a complete failure and won't be accepted." >
item.dc:creator: kayzersosie

item.title: A thief doesn't read and a reader doesn't steal
item.description: When Anna Carin Elf arrived at the Gothenburg City Library on a Saturday morning, she expected the silence of a building closed for a public holiday. It was All Saints Day—a time typically reserved for quiet reflection and honoring the deceased. Instead, she found the library humming with life. Unbeknownst to the staff, a door had been left unlocked the previous evening. For hours, the library functioned perfectly, without a single employee on-site. All books were borrowed and return normally. An Open Door The visitors were also surprised, when they found out what happened Elf says. “They thought it was a bit empty. But the people in the library behaved as usual. Many were sitting reading newspapers, some families were in the children’s section and others were searching for books on the computer.”
item.dc:creator: Betterbecauseofthem

item.title: The MAGA Gravy Train Is Headed Straight Off A Cliff. Ted Lieu Would Like To Help It Get There Faster.
item.description: Congressman Ted Lieu just announced a future Democratic administration will prosecute the Trump family for raking in money illegally. $9 BILLION in personal profit during his presidency. Eric Trump publicly boasting about a robotics company he works for that just got a $24 million Pentagon contract. This is not subtle. The BBC investigated and found a consistent pattern of market spikes hours or minutes BEFORE Trump makes major announcements. Every time he posts something geopolitically significant on Truth Social, suspiciously timed trades appear in the lead-up. Only someone with advance knowledge could do that. ONLY INSIDERS. He has turned the White House into a casino where he controls the deck. Crypto pump and dump schemes. Sweetheart Pentagon deals for his kids. Market manipulation via Truth Social posts. $9 billion in personal profit. The gravy train has its own Secret Service detail and a Mar-a-Lago membership. Lieu is right. Voting them out isn't enough. Every single one needs convictions and imprisonment. Because anything less gives the next aspiring crime family a fucking instruction manual. The MAGA gravy train is headed straight off a cliff. Let's make sure it takes them with it. ⚖️ #TedLieu #TrumpCrimefamily #InsiderTrading #PentagonContracts #MarketManipulation #$9Billion #ProsecuteThem #MAGAGravyTrain #WhiteHouseCasino #LockThemUp
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Dump and Peace
item.description:
I mean, you could fight them with a sword…
When coworkers ask me if I’m hot/cold etc because of the weird climate conditions in my job I just say I’m always uncomfortable and that life is suffering. I don’t get invited out much.
Me and my lo-fi beats trying to ignore the horrors
Yeah but it’s our prison
Great, now there’s this thing
Be kind and be empathetic
I used to think the people in charge were like these fools, but they at least asked questions and tried to solve problems. What we have is worse
If you’re into that sort of thing
Bring the cheesecake
The baddie I expect to pull by never leaving my apartment and saying weird shit to everyone
Leave him. That’s a narc
How it feels lately. Dark but beautiful
Im an ad hating commie
The party I wish I was invited to
It goes IN YOU
Mmm a slightly undercooked breakfast would go great right now. Instead I’ll have weak coffee with this chemical tasting zero sugar creamer
I always thought Banshee was cool
What doomscrolling feels like
Reminds me of the Beauty is in the eye of the Beholder twilight zone ep
Is this a warning? An advertisement?
Space is scary. Who knows what’s out there?
I used to have nightmares as a kid of pools of green acid. Still trying to find a picture that captures the terror I felt
Why I’m not dating. I’m not sure of anything anymore and love requires a focus and a certainty I’m not sure I’m capable of anymore
Gotta post Audrey
rainy day tax
item.dc:creator: vagrantvigilantepunk

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description: So Panko had been enjoying ear rubs a little too much so made me suspect he may have an ear infection. Suspected right. Vet visit they checked and he was yeasty and close to one so they treated it as if it was. Boy catching no breaks recently! Ear stuff they gave him definitely helped and should last about a month.

item.title: GovBrief Today #449
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche today streamlined how the federal government kills convicts. No modern president executed as many prisoners as Donald Trump did during his first term. The lethal injections he approved then are back. Blanche even okayed death by firing squad. To handle the presumed influx of executions, the Bureau of Prisons has been told to build a new execution facility, and Blanche has authorized prosecutors to seek death in nine more cases. None of this is for the three people on federal death row tonight. It's for the nine Blanche just authorized and whoever the Department of Justice comes for next. To further tip the scales, Blanche changed the mercy rule. The last plea for mercy now comes only after the final appeal has run out, when there's nothing left to plead to. Call your representatives through 5 Calls and Resistbot and demand Congress block funding for the new federal execution facility before it gets built. I've emailed 7,130 stories over 449 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Easy click links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260424-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr24 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/mills-veto [3] https://go.govbrief.today/spirit-bailout [4] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-apr25 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-powell [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-irs-judge [7] https://go.govbrief.today/maduro-funds [8] https://go.govbrief.today/firing-squads [9] https://go.govbrief.today/az-detention-suit [10] https://go.govbrief.today/text-retention [11] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-retirement-backlog [12] https://go.govbrief.today/border-asylum-ruling Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Yes please
item.dc:creator: AllAnusMorissette

item.title: I Wooded my Wood with Wood. 600% soaked. Perfect 5/7.
item.description:
I recently acquired this from an estate I helped clean out.
This is a "German style" woodworking bench.
This style of workbench dates back to the 1600s.
This particular one is probably from the late 1700s. I'd guess 1780s or so.
The main beam of it is old growth Oak, stupidly tight grain for oak, and inordinately dense.
I love the dovetailing. It's mainly put together with wooden pegs, and blacksmith made screws. Whoever built this was a genius at their craft. All square nails in it are afterthoughts. (Nails are wedges and over time, weaken the wood. Although square nails grip more than round nails.)
I've worked with a lot American and European antiques in my 25+ years experience in the business. In my opinion, this was made in Germany in the 18th century, and probably brought to the United States in the early 1800s as a family heirloom.
Also, this shoulder vice.... the face of the shoulder vice is a plank of oak that's trenneled in. If you aren't a woodworking nerd, trennels are small wooden pegs that are wedge shaped, used as nails. Ugh! I fucking love this piece. Hnnnngggg. I'm selling it. That's why I'm posting this. To commit it to memory.
Also, another reason I believe it's European and was brought over? It has slight powder post beetle damage on the base. Powder post beetles are not native to the US. They are typically only found on imported antique furniture. (PSA side note: It's not a good idea to buy antique furniture that has been recently imported from another country. It may carry all sorts of foreign insects. For example, one client of mine, imported a 40ft container of antique wooden furniture from France....and had to write it all off as a loss due to the shipping company not keeping powder post beetles from taking hold in the inventory.)
These are called Dog Holes! Ain't that neat?
Count the rings on that piece of Oak!
Mortise and Tenon! Simple! Effective! I loves it.
Okay, the drawer may have been made here in the US, because, hilariously, that drawer front is old growth Maple. The drawer sides are old growth pine. Also, I spent TEN FUCKING HOURS CLEANING THIS BECAUSE SOME ASSHAT PUT THE WORLD'S THIRD SHITTIEST COAT OF FUCKING EPOXY RESIN ON THE TOP, SO I USED A WIRE BRUSH, ZYLENE, A BELT SANDER, A KNIFE, AND A WHOLE FUCKIN' LOT OF GUMPTION TO UN-FUCK THAT.
item.dc:creator: EzraFell

item.title: Mormons are fighting trans rights with their $309 BILLION. wealthiest US religion with such a small population
item.description: I grew up in this cult. Born and raised in Provo UT and Orem UT. My father was a “Bishop”. My parents estranged their first grandchild when he came out LGBTQIA. Awful people. Latter Day Saint Mormon tax evasion: Mormon church fined for obscuring $32 billion investment portfolio https://apnews.com/article/mormonism-us-securities-and-exchange-commission-religion-business-a598c9ef9544f57e0b60d5ca80774bf7 Mormons hide a lot of Child Sex Abuse (im one of their victims linkinbio) Recordings show how the Mormon church protects itself from child sex abuse claims https://apnews.com/article/mormon-church-investigation-child-sex-abuse-9c301f750725c0f06344f948690caf16 Mormons are homophobic and transphobic. They fund hate groups going after LGBTQIA rights: Mormon Church cracks down on trans members, may group them with child abusers https://www.advocate.com/news/mormon-crackdown-trans-members Wealthiest religions: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_wealthiest_religious_organizations
item.dc:creator: lurkyloos

item.title: Please help spread this EU citizens initiative for full suspension of EU-Israel association agreement
item.description: Fellow EU citizens, please help me spread this EU citizens initiative for full suspension of EU-Israel Association agreement. Israel must be stopped. Copy the link and send it to anyone who is interested (or not interested). EU Citizens' initiative link (sign, copy and share with everyone): https://eci.ec.europa.eu/055/public/#/screen/home Target is 1.500.000, above the minimum, just in case some signatures are invalid. Facts: The EU is Israel’s biggest tradinge partner, accounting for 32% of Israel's total trade in goods with the world in 2024. 34.2% of Israel’s imports came from the EU while , and 28.8% of the country’s exports went to the EU.  Source: https://policy.trade.ec.europa.eu/eu-trade-relationships-country-and-region/countries-and-regions/israel_en Israel must be stopped!!! #europe #european_union #israel #genocide #gaza #palestine #freepalestine #libanon #Germany #France #Italy #Spain #Poland #Netherlands #Belgium #Sweden #Austria #Denmark #Finland #Ireland #Portugal #Czechia #Romania #Hungary #Greece #Slovakia #Bulgaria #Croatia #Lithuania #Slovenia #Latvia #Estonia #Cyprus #Luxembourg #Malta #peace
item.dc:creator: lalalalsblablabal

item.title: I now hate Saturdays
item.description: My cat got out less than a week ago and I’ve posted about him to no avail. I miss my void muffin so much, I am not ok. (Frontpage edit)-Y’all are too much, in glass case of emotion over here…I am despondent but hopeful. I treasure this community, thank you all for your support. And if I laugh at any mortal thing, ’T is that I may not weep; and if I weep, ’T is that our nature cannot always bring Itself to apathy-Lord Byron
item.dc:creator: DaymanAhAAAAah
